description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Run bot that runs on push and pull request events, excluding branches prefixed with 'l10n_'. Use a matrix job strategy on ubuntu-latest to test with Python versions 3.7 through 3.11, with a 10-minute timeout. For each job, check out the repository, set up the corresponding Python version, download a configuration file, install dependencies from requirements.txt, and start the bot with a test command.
